The Playbook

About the Coach

As a player-coach for the Bomb Squad, I bring a dual perspective to the diamond. My journey began the moment my son stepped into Little League, and since then, I’ve dedicated myself to mastering the nuances of the game. For me, it’s about more than just the box score—it’s about the thrill of the competition, the strategy of the battle, and the unbreakable brotherhood of the club.

Years Coaching: 8 | Favorite Team: Los Angeles Dodgers
